description_long: This is a large, modern sectional sofa with a U-shaped configuration, designed to accommodate multiple people comfortably. The sofa features deep, plush seat and back cushions that appear to be upholstered in a dark, solid-colored fabric, likely charcoal or black. The armrests are low and straight, matching the height of the backrest, and provide a streamlined, contemporary look. The sofa is elevated on slender, metal legs, which are positioned at the corners and possibly at central support points, giving it a light, airy appearance. The overall design is minimalist, with clean lines and no visible decorative elements or patterns on the upholstery. This type of sofa would be suitable for urban environments such as apartment lobbies, modern living rooms, or communal lounge areas.
description: A large, U-shaped modern sectional sofa with deep, dark fabric cushions and slim metal legs, featuring a minimalist, contemporary design.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the full U-shaped sectional layout and the arrangement of seat and back cushions.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the seat, the straight armrest, and the slim metal legs.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous backrest and the uniform height of the back and armrests.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the mirrored sectional extension and the consistent cushion arrangement.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Multiple individual seat and back cushions arranged in a U-shaped sectional layout; cushions are uniform in size, appear attached, and cover all seating and backrest areas.
attribute_armrest_style: Low, straight armrests at each end of the sectional, matching the backrest height, with a minimalist, padded design and no decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Slender, cylindrical metal legs positioned at the corners and possibly at central points; legs are exposed, have a metallic finish, and provide an elevated, modern look.
attribute_backrest_type: Continuous, straight backrest of medium height, matching the armrest height, with attached back cushions and no visible tufting or segmentation.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid, dark-colored fabric with a smooth, matte finish and no visible patterns, tufting, or decorative stitching.
